summary: PR inventory shard only; no shared canonical was provided or inferred. Planned one non-mutating conservative classification per open PR using the hydrated preflight artifact and fix-artifact item matrix. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-route action is recommended.

actions.reason: Independent open dependency/config PR with insufficient proof for any close or merge recommendation in plan mode.
Docs PR is independent; low-signal closure is disabled and proof is not sufficient for a mutating recommendation.
Substantive Telegram fix PR should remain independently queued for maintainer review, not closed as inventory cleanup.
Independent exec-adjacent behavior PR; security-shaped labels do not require quarantine, and merge/fix actions are blocked.
Maintainer-oriented feature PR is independent inventory work and not closable as duplicate/superseded.
Independent Codex feature PR with failing proof/core check; no close or merge action is safe.
Independent CLI fix PR; keep for normal maintainer/author flow rather than closing or merging from this shard.
Broad multi-area PR is independent and remains in author/maintainer review, with bot review history preventing any merge shortcut.
Independent Google Chat PR with no duplicate/superseded evidence.
Independent auto-reply fix PR with failing proof/security check; keep non-mutating and do not quarantine based only on a failing check.
Independent configuration/agent PR; no closure evidence.
Independent doctor feature PR; not a shared canonical despite appearing in canonical_candidates.
Independent memory-wiki PR with bot review history; keep queued for normal review.
Independent memory-core fix PR with sufficient proof but no allowed merge path in this plan.
Large maintainer-owned command authorization PR is independent and dirty; no close/merge recommendation is safe.
Small independent outbound fix PR; not duplicate/superseded and not mergeable by this worker.
Large independent web UI i18n PR; keep non-mutating.
Independent status-context fix PR; keep queued due to no allowed merge and a failing check in artifact evidence.
Independent UI feature PR; conservative non-mutating classification despite check hydration gap.
Independent channel policy fix PR; keep non-mutating due to missing check enrichment and no close/merge basis.
Independent plugin SDK feature PR; conservative keep because checks/files were not fully hydrated and close/merge/fix are disabled or unsupported.
Independent cron validation PR; keep non-mutating because hydrated state is enough for conservative classification but not enough for merge or closure.
Large independent memory/privacy feature PR; security-shaped labels alone do not trigger route_security, and missing checks prevent stronger action.
Independent systemd provenance PR; keep non-mutating due to no duplicate/superseded evidence and no full check preflight.
Independent gateway availability/automation PR; keep non-mutating because proof is still requested and checks are not hydrated.
